languages.text: "На одном из соседних миров я нашел шаттл с записанным обращением от меровского полка".
"I found a shuttle on one of the neighbouring worlds. It contained a recorded message from a Merovian regiment."
languages.original_text: "На одном из соседних миров я нашел шаттл с записанным обращением от меровского полка".

traits.locale_text: "I found a shuttle on one of the neighbouring worlds. It contained a recorded message from a Merovian regiment."
"I found a shuttle on one of the neighbouring worlds. It contained a recorded message from a Merovian regiment."
"I found a shuttle on one of the neighbouring worlds. It contained a recorded message from a Merovian regiment."
"I found a shuttle on one of the neighbouring worlds. It contained a recorded message from a Merovian regiment."

languages.text: 「隣接する世界のひとつでシャトル艇を発見した。中にはメロヴィアンの連隊からの録音メッセージが入っていた」
languages.original_text: "I found a shuttle on one of the neighbouring worlds. It contained a recorded message from a Merovian regiment."

traits.locale_text: 隣接する世界のひとつでシャトル艇を発見した。中にはメロヴィアンの連隊からの録音メッセージが入っていた。

languages.text: « J'ai trouvé une navette sur l'un des mondes voisins, avec à son bord un message enregistré par un régiment merovien. »
languages.original_text: "I found a shuttle on one of the neighbouring worlds. It contained a recorded message from a Merovian regiment."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai trouvé une navette sur l'un des mondes voisins, avec à son bord un message enregistré par un régiment merovien. »

languages.text: "Komşu dünyalardan birinde bir mekik buldum. İçinde bir Merov alayının kaydettiği bir mesaj vardı."
languages.original_text: "I found a shuttle on one of the neighbouring worlds. It contained a recorded message from a Merovian regiment."

traits.locale_text: "Komşu dünyalardan birinde bir mekik buldum. İçinde bir Merov alayının kaydettiği bir mesaj vardı."

languages.text: "Ich habe auf einer Nachbarwelt ein Shuttle gefunden. Es enthielt eine aufgezeichnete Nachricht eines merovianischen Regiments."
languages.original_text: "I found a shuttle on one of the neighbouring worlds. It contained a recorded message from a Merovian regiment."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe auf einer Nachbarwelt ein Shuttle gefunden. Es enthielt eine aufgezeichnete Nachricht eines merovianischen Regiments."

languages.text: «He encontrado una lanzadera en uno de los mundos vecinos. Contenía el mensaje grabado de un regimiento meroviano».
languages.original_text: "I found a shuttle on one of the neighbouring worlds. It contained a recorded message from a Merovian regiment."

traits.locale_text: «He encontrado una lanzadera en uno de los mundos vecinos. Contenía el mensaje grabado de un regimiento meroviano».

languages.text: “我在某个邻近的世界上发现了一艘穿梭机，里面有一段来自梅罗维军团的记录信息。”
languages.original_text: "I found a shuttle on one of the neighbouring worlds. It contained a recorded message from a Merovian regiment."

traits.locale_text: “我在某个邻近的世界上发现了一艘穿梭机，里面有一段来自梅罗维军团的记录信息。”
